Banquet tables, floor-length linens, serving equipment

cocktailHourAdditions.oysterNotes: +$250 chargrilled set-up; +$220 per oyster chef (2 chefs for 3+ sacks); 2.5 oysters pp/hr recommended
cocktailHourAdditions.fullRawSeafoodBar: Market price — oysters, jumbo shrimp cocktail, marinated crab claws, smoked fish dip

dinnerStyles.label: Family Style Dinner
dinnerStyles.rule: 1st course: one salad OR one appetizer. 2nd course: one entrée + two sides.
dinnerStyles.notes: 60–90 min service. China/flatware/glassware/guest tables not included.

dinnerStyles.label: Plated Dinner
dinnerStyles.rule: 1st course: one salad OR one appetizer. 2nd course: one entrée + two sides.
dinnerStyles.notes: Min 8 / cap 150 guests. Two pre-selected entrée choices +$10 pp (counts + seating chart due 2 weeks out).

dinnerStyles.label: Stations
dinnerStyles.rule: One appetizer OR one salad + one entrée + two sides.
dinnerStyles.notes: Replenished 120 min; min 15 guests. Complimentary rolls & butter + crudité platter per 100 guests.

bar.note: 3-hour event basis. Guests 10–21: $8 pp non-alcoholic package; under 10 free. Glassware not included ($8 pp rental).
bar.spiritsIncluded: Cathead Vodka, Espolòn Blanco Tequila, Elijah Craig Bourbon, Monkey Shoulder Scotch, Fords Gin, Planteray 3 Star White Rum
bar.specialtyCocktails: Old Fashioned, Sazerac, Aperitif Spritz, Martini, Cosmopolitan, Paloma, French 75, Margarita

feesAndPolicies: Labor $220/staff for 3-hour event (+$40/hr after); minimums by service style
Glassware $8 pp; dinnerware + flatware $6 pp; catering kitchen pop-up min $1,000
Cake cutting $100 (Bacchanal); 7.5% admin charge + 10.75% sales tax; gratuity optional (5–10% suggested)
Menu + guaranteed guest count due 14 days before event; count may increase, never decrease
50% deposit to book; balance due 14 days out; cancellation 50%/75%/100% at <30/<10/<5 days
Vendor meals $20 pp; kids under 12 menu $10; all dietary restrictions accommodated
